nav_sections.label: Study
nav_sections.title: Study at Regent's
nav_sections.description: Pursue your passions in the heart of London. Choose from a range of undergraduate, postgraduate and professional programmes designed for the ambitious and creative.

nav_sections.label: Why Regent's
nav_sections.title: Why Regent's?
nav_sections.description: Discover what makes Regent's unique — from our Regent's Park campus and global community to industry connections and personalised learning.

nav_sections.label: International
nav_sections.title: International Students
nav_sections.description: Join students from over 140 nationalities at Regent's. Find everything you need to know about studying in London as an international student.

nav_sections.label: Student Life
nav_sections.title: Student Life
nav_sections.description: Life at Regent's extends far beyond the classroom. Explore everything from student societies and sports to wellbeing and accommodation.

nav_sections.label: Admissions
nav_sections.title: Admissions
nav_sections.description: Find out how to apply, what we look for, and what support is available to help you through the application process.

nav_sections.label: Schools
nav_sections.title: Our Schools
nav_sections.description: Regent's is home to four specialist schools, each offering a focused academic environment where creative and professional ambition thrive.

detail_panels.title: Undergraduate
detail_panels.description: Explore our broad range of creative, business and social science programmes — all taught in the heart of London.

detail_panels.title: Postgraduate
detail_panels.description: Advance your career with a postgraduate degree from Regent's — where specialist knowledge meets professional ambition.

detail_panels.title: The Regent's Difference
detail_panels.description: Discover what sets Regent's apart — an education built around you, in one of the world's most inspiring cities.

detail_panels.title: Our Campus
detail_panels.description: Study in the heart of London — our Regent's Park campus is a place of beauty, creativity and possibility.

detail_panels.title: International Overview
detail_panels.description: Everything you need to know about joining Regent's as an international student — wherever you are in the world.

detail_panels.title: Visa & Immigration
detail_panels.description: Get guidance on student visas, immigration requirements, and everything you need to study in the UK.

detail_panels.title: Student Experience
detail_panels.description: Discover the full student experience at Regent's, from orientation to graduation.

detail_panels.title: Accommodation
detail_panels.description: Live on campus in the heart of Regent's Park — safe, convenient and inspiring.

detail_panels.title: Clubs & Societies
detail_panels.description: From debate to dance, there's a society for every interest at Regent's.

detail_panels.title: Wellbeing & Support
detail_panels.description: Your wellbeing matters — we provide a full range of mental health and pastoral support services.

detail_panels.title: How to Apply
detail_panels.description: Step-by-step guidance through the application process, from choosing your course to receiving your offer.

detail_panels.title: Fees & Funding
detail_panels.description: Find out about tuition fees, scholarships, bursaries and other funding options available to you.

detail_panels.title: Open Days
detail_panels.description: Visit us in person or online and experience Regent's for yourself.

detail_panels.title: School of Psychotherapy & Psychology
detail_panels.description: World-class programmes in psychology, psychotherapy and counselling in central London.

detail_panels.title: School of Business
detail_panels.description: Develop real-world business skills through innovative, industry-led programmes at our London campus.

detail_panels.title: School of Arts & Culture
detail_panels.description: Creative programmes in film, fashion, acting, design and the arts at the heart of London's cultural scene.

detail_panels.title: School of Law
detail_panels.description: Study law at one of London's most distinctive universities — academic rigour meets practical experience.
